summaryShort: Cosmetic scratches found on electric motor part at assembly line 2; severity assessed as low.
summaryLong: A worker at **Montage Linie 2** reported cosmetic defects (scratches) on an electric motor being assembled. The defect is rated as **low severity** since it does not pose an immediate functional risk, but the worker noted it warrants closer inspection to assess the quality issue further. No immediate stop-the-bleed action was taken.

article.source: Als der Elektromotor, den wir da zusammenbauen

defect_code.source: da sind Kratzer dran und so weiter

severity.source: der Fehler ist jetzt nicht so unglaublich gravierend

keywords.source: da sind Kratzer dran und so weiter; Qualitätsmängel; optischen Fehler
